items.title: Critical Zimbra Flaw Could Let Crafted Emails Run Malicious Code in User Sessions
items.summary:
Zimbra is urging customers to apply updates to address a critical security vulnerability impacting the Classic Web Client that could result in arbitrary code execution.

The vulnerability has been described as a case of...

items.title: 'Ghostcommit' hides prompt injection in images to fool AI agents, steal secrets
items.summary: A PNG hiding a prompt injection could steal your repo's secrets, researchers demonstrate. The technique, dubbed 'Ghostcommit,' slipped past AI code reviewers CodeRabbit and Bugbot, which never open image files at all, th...
